text:
= NDC is exempt from the drug rebate program (biological and medical devices). These are 
prescribed drugs that do not meet the definition of a COD. There are several examples; the easiest 
is insect repellent. State release 178 provides more details: https://www.medicaid.gov/medicaid-
chip-program-information/by-topics/prescription-drugs/downloads/rx-releases/state-
releases/state-rel-178.pdf 
Null/missing = Source value is missing, or unknown
